decisions.rationale: The observation base_record_id is corridor_first-second-avenues-brt, which matches the observation's own record exactly. The source 201111_1st2nd_progress_report is already captured as a source_id of that record, and the alias corridor_first-second-avenues-sbs-201111 already exists. The observation already cleanly resolves to this record, so this is new (already resolved, not a link to a different record).
